_comment: Milestone 2.5 search-intent ownership map. Derived from the owner's actual Google Search Console exports (domain property, ~2025-08-27 through 2026-07-16). These are search-intent concepts, NOT phrases to paste repeatedly. Human-readable companion: docs/seo/search-console-content-preservation-map.md. The homepage owns broad commercial intent; no other page may be repositioned to compete with it.
source: Google Search Console consolidated export (see docs/PROJECT_OPERATING_MANUAL.md section 10). No credentials or account data are stored in this repository.

pages.page_role: Primary full-service hardwood-flooring business page and the site's strongest organic asset (~862 clicks / ~132k impressions across homepage variants in the baseline period).
pages.primary_search_intent: Broad commercial: hardwood/wood floor refinishing San Diego, San Diego hardwood flooring, brand searches (San Diego Hardwoods).
pages.cannibalization_risks: Assessment page must not become the destination for generic refinishing/repair searches; homepage keeps a short assessment intro only. Galleries support, not compete with, the homepage for refinishing terms.
pages.factual_limitations: No GA4 ID, no street address, no invented review/rating/hours claims. 'Dust-contained', never 'dust-free'/'100%'.
owner_review_required: Stage/angle of each of the four confirmed TRICIA WALNUT homepage photos
Project identities of the remaining ~86 homepage gallery photos
Whether the 'Carmel Valley Richard Marshall Walnut Floors' text card describes the Bing Crosby Ranch project

pages.page_role: Dedicated professional cleaning / maintenance-recoating service page.
pages.primary_search_intent: Professional hardwood floor cleaning and wood floor deep cleaning.
secondary_search_topics: local cleaning queries (Coronado, Carmel Valley, Poway)
must_remain_visible: deep cleaning only vs. cleaning + maintenance recoating vs. full sanding/refinishing distinction
situations where cleaning cannot repair worn-through finish or exposed raw wood
belongs_on_other_pages: terrazzo or other non-wood services (nowhere - do not chase irrelevant impressions)
pages.cannibalization_risks: Must not be rewritten into a general refinishing page; refinishing intent belongs to the homepage and is handled by an explicit 'when cleaning isn't enough' cross-link.
pages.factual_limitations: Never claim cleaning restores every damaged or worn floor. Keep local references restrained and accurate.
owner_review_required: Project facts for the 20 cleaning gallery pairs
Whether the existing title/description should later be tuned (existing description preserved this milestone)

pages.primary_search_intent: Before-and-after hardwood floor refinishing proof in San Diego.
secondary_search_topics: hardwood floor damage repair San Diego
gsc_query_themes: hardwood floor damage repair San Diego
must_remain_visible: all project modules and their detailed titles
refinishing / sanding / repair / cleaning / restoration breadth in the intro
pages.cannibalization_risks: Supports homepage refinishing intent with proof; must not adopt a homepage-style service-page structure.
pages.factual_limitations: Project titles/descriptions are legacy owner text; do not invent corrections - owner confirms facts via the media-review workflow.
owner_review_required: Per-project species/location/stage confirmation via docs/media-review/recent_project_photo_gallery_1.md

pages.page_role: Mixed proof gallery #2: refinishing, installation, repair, restoration, specialty finishes.
pages.primary_search_intent: Recent San Diego hardwood flooring projects (refinishing + installation + repair mix).
must_remain_visible: all project modules including the reunited #27 Rancho Santa Fe & Bird Rock write-up
pages.cannibalization_risks: Same as gallery 1 - proof role, not service-page role.
pages.factual_limitations: Do not convert project descriptions into generic SEO wording.
owner_review_required: Per-project facts via docs/media-review/recent_project_photo_gallery_2.md

pages.page_role: Proof gallery #3 (projects #41-#50), canonical corrected in Milestone 2.4.
pages.primary_search_intent: San Diego hardwood floor refinishing / sanding / repair proof.
pages.cannibalization_risks: Do not repeat 'hardwood flooring contractors San Diego' unnaturally; contractor-trust language is About's job.
pages.factual_limitations: Titles come from the frozen raw source; corrections only via owner-confirmed media facts.
owner_review_required: Per-project facts via docs/media-review/recent_project_photo_gallery_3.md

pages.page_role: Proof gallery #4 (projects #61-#80): restoration + deep-cleaning identity, includes the two confirmed Bing Crosby Ranch walnut modules (#76, #77).
pages.primary_search_intent: Hardwood/bamboo floor restoration and deep-cleaning proof.
secondary_search_topics: hardwood floor cleaning coastal/North San Diego
gsc_query_themes: hardwood floor cleaning coastal San Diego
hardwood floor cleaning North San Diego
must_remain_visible: cleaning vs. recoating vs. full refinishing distinction in the CTA cards
pages.cannibalization_risks: Must not imply every bamboo or hardwood floor suits every process; CTA cards already qualify ('when appropriate').
pages.factual_limitations: TRICIA WALNUT32/105/52 stage claims are unconfirmed beyond project identity; do not extend them.
owner_review_required: Stage/angle confirmation for walnut modules #76/#77
Per-project facts via docs/media-review/recent_project_photo_gallery_4.md

pages.page_role: Proof gallery #5 (projects #81-#85), unusual established filename preserved (Milestone 2.4 decision).
pages.primary_search_intent: San Diego wood floor refinishing / sanding / repair proof.
must_remain_visible: all five before/after project pairs with their restored write-ups (#81-#85)
pages.cannibalization_risks: None new; keep filename and canonical exactly as approved.
pages.factual_limitations: Do not restructure or remove projects; filename must never be 'corrected'.
owner_review_required: Per-project facts via docs/media-review/recent_project_gallery_5.md

pages.page_role: Installation expertise page: solid + unfinished engineered installation, four complete projects.
pages.primary_search_intent: Wood / hardwood floor installation San Diego.
belongs_on_other_pages: general refinishing depth (homepage) - installation purpose must stay dominant
pages.cannibalization_risks: Refinishing language must not overpower installation purpose; hero keeps installation first.
pages.factual_limitations: Milestone 2.5 removed 'far exceeds', 'flawless', and absolute dust claims per the claims policy. TRICIA WALNUT27/30/63/76 filenames conflict with the white-oak project description - flagged for owner review, not changed.
owner_review_required: Resolve the TRICIA WALNUT filename vs. white-oak description conflict for project 1's four images
Confirm remaining project facts via docs/media-review/solid_wood_floor_photo_gallery.md

pages.page_role: Complete channel video archive (58 public videos) with category filters and VideoObject schema.
pages.primary_search_intent: Hardwood floor refinishing / sanding process videos, San Diego.
pages.cannibalization_risks: Keeps video intent; homepage keeps the broad refinishing intent (its Milestone 2.4 title change moved video terms here deliberately).
pages.factual_limitations: Never invent video dates, durations, locations, or species; snapshot (build/data/youtube_videos.json) is the source of truth. Known metadata flags (duplicate titles, 'Title:' prefix) are owner-review items - the YouTube titles themselves are the source and are not editable here. The 'Sold Cherry' typo (video AFiDErGMYdo) is corrected site-wide via that record's `site_display_title` (2026-07-19 owner-directed fix); the raw `title` field still holds the live, uncorrected YouTube title on purpose -- fix on YouTube first if the owner wants the live title itself to change.
owner_review_required: Confirm official channel URL (visible links use @SANDIEGOHARDWOODS; assessment-page schema sameAs uses @SD-1974)
Fix flagged titles on YouTube if desired, then refresh the snapshot

pages.page_role: Company identity, history, credentials, owner-operated trust.
pages.primary_search_intent: Hardwood floor refinishing company / contractors / refinishers (trust and brand validation).
must_remain_visible: CSLB-licensed wording WITHOUT the exact license number (Milestone 2.6 owner decision: the number is not published)
pages.cannibalization_risks: Must not read like a large anonymous organization; no unsupported completion-time or perfect-result claims.
pages.factual_limitations: All credential claims must remain exactly the owner-confirmed set.
owner_review_required: LARK56.jpg caption facts (Encinitas wide-plank oak claim is unverified legacy alt text)

pages.primary_search_intent: Informational flooring content (no dedicated GSC page export collected; existing content is the evidence).
must_remain_visible: all 12 case studies including the reunited #3
technical decision content (cleaning vs recoat vs refinish, bleaching, custom stains)
pages.cannibalization_risks: Do not mass-produce thin articles; do not restructure into a service page.
pages.factual_limitations: No new thin copy; improvements only where supported by existing content.
owner_review_required: Case-study image facts via docs/media-review/blog.md

pages.page_role: Normal contact and preliminary lead-intake page.
must_remain_visible: free phone & photo assessment as the starting point
belongs_on_other_pages: full assessment pricing architecture (assessment page only)
pages.cannibalization_risks: Must not duplicate the assessment pricing table. Title retitled in Milestone 2.6 by owner decision to 'Contact San Diego Hardwoods | Free Phone & Photo Assessment' ('free estimate(s)' is banned from public output); body copy carries the Text -> Call -> Email hierarchy.
pages.factual_limitations: Never imply every in-home visit is free; never imply any inquiry requires a paid visit.

pages.page_role: Professional paid assessments, inspections, consultations, written documentation (new page, no GSC history).
pages.primary_search_intent: Hardwood floor assessment / inspection San Diego; pre-purchase floor inspection; written floor-condition report.
must_remain_visible: Complex Damage, Dispute & Insurance Analysis from $1,500
pages.cannibalization_risks: Must never become the primary refinishing destination; its language stays assessment/inspection-specific.
pages.factual_limitations: No automatic litigation/testimony/engineering/lab/legal/appraisal implications. No invented report excerpts, visit durations, or delivery times - structured inputs await owner facts in build/data/assessment/.
owner_review_required: Anonymized report excerpts (build/data/assessment/report_examples.json)
Practical visit/delivery facts (build/data/assessment/practical_service_facts.json)
Official YouTube URL for schema sameAs
